popularStory.headline: Henryk I "The Bearded", Prince Of Silesia, Krakow and Great Poland
popularStory.description: Henry I the Bearded (Polish: Henryk I Brodaty; ca. 1165/70 – 19 March 1238), of the Silesian line of the Piast dynasty, was Duke of Silesia at Wrocław from 1201 and Duke of Kraków and thus High Duke o …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henryk Brodaty Piast於大約1167年出生時，他的父親Bolesław I Wysoki Piast41歲，母親Adellheid Christina Von Sulzbach29歲。他和Hedwig von Andechs至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1238年3月19日在波蘭盧布斯吉波維亞特 可洛希聶n斯吉可盧斯諾 奧德爾札n斯吉享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: Henryk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henryk Brodaty Piast was born about 1167, his father, Bolesław I Wysoki Piast, was 41 and his mother, Adellheid Christina Von Sulzbach, was 29. He had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Hedwig von Andechs. He died on 19 March 1238, in Krosno Odrzańskie, Krosno Odrzańskie, Lubusz, Poland, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henryk Brodaty Piast est né environ 1167, son père, Bolesław I Wysoki Piast, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Adellheid Christina Von Sulzbach, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Hedwig von Andechs. Il est décédé le 19 mars 1238, à Krosno Odrzańskie, Powiat krośnieński, lubuskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henryk Brodaty Piast um 1167 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bolesław I Wysoki Piast 41 und seine Mutter Adellheid Christina Von Sulzbach 29. Er hatte mit Hedwig von Andechs mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 19. März 1238 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Krosno Odrzańskie, Powiat krośnieński, lubuskie, Polen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henryk Brodaty Piast è nato il circa 1167, il suo padre, Bolesław I Wysoki Piast, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Adellheid Christina Von Sulzbach, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Hedwig von Andechs. Morì il 19 marzo 1238, nel Krosno Odrzańskie, Powiat krośnieński, lubuskie, Polonia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henryk Brodaty Piastが約1167年に生まれた時，父Bolesław I Wysoki Piastは41歳，母Adellheid Christina Von Sulzbachは29歳であった。彼はHedwig von Andechsとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1238年3月19日にポーランドルブスキポウィアト クロsニーnスキクロスノ オドルザnスキで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henryk Brodaty Piast(이)가 대략 1167년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bolesław I Wysoki Piast(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Adellheid Christina Von Sulzbach(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Hedwig von Andechs(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1238년 3월 19일 폴란드 루버스키 파위앳 크로s니n스키 크로스노 오드르자n스키에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Hedwig von Andechs. Ele faleceu em 19 de março de 1238, em Krosno Odrzańskie, Powiat krośnieński, lubuskie, Polônia, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henryk Brodaty Piast родился около 1167 г., его отцу по имени Bolesław I Wysoki Piast было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Adellheid Christina Von Sulzbach, 29. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Hedwig von Andechs. Он умер 19 марта 1238 г. в местности кросно одрзаnски, поуят кроsниеnски, лубуски, Польша в возрасте 72 лет.
